expected_behavior: Egress is denied, policy is default-deny, app role cannot bypass RLS, high-risk actions require approval, and shell/host access remains blocked.
given: Configuration is missing, reset, partially upgraded, or a new workspace/tenant is created.
notes: Scenario-specific validator executed against local synthetic users, tenants, policy, Postgres RLS, OPA, egress, audit, and regression evidence as applicable.
required_evidence: Default config snapshot, denial suite, RLS/role inventory.
then: Egress is denied, policy is default-deny, app role cannot bypass RLS, high-risk actions require approval, and shell/host access remains blocked.
